full_text:
Wang Meng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Meng. Adopted son of regular attendant Wang Fu. Treasurer of the Palace of Prolonged Joy. Wang Meng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wang Meng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
